title: Change the calendar display "today" more conspicuously!
excerpt:
Whenever I look at the calendar, I have to check and see today’s date separately. I can’t really see today’s calendar because only the numbers are marked in blue. 
We suggest changing the color of the entire compartment …

posts.author: yousunkim (김유순)
posts.cookedHtml:
Whenever I look at the calendar, I have to check and see today’s date separately. I can’t really see today’s calendar because only the numbers are marked in blue.
We suggest changing the color of the entire compartment of today’s date, or intuitively changing it to make it a little more visible.

posts.author: Lia (Lia Hanson)
posts.cookedHtml:
I also would like “today” to be more obvious. Could the entire square be highlighted instead of just the number bolded?

  • Our Marketing Team uses Monday on a daily basis. We track events, pr, social, content, and email.
  • We use the calendar view frequently and it’s helpful to click on “today” to orientate us to our current week or day.
  • It adds on time to try to find today, especially if in a hurry.
  • No workarounds.

posts.author: Franziska1982 (Franziska Dietrich)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes - I would like to see this as well
